content: agent1: implementing dry_run option for Image.save() in src/PIL/Image.py + Tests/test_image.py. Will touch Image.py's save() method primarily. Let me know if you're touching save().

agent1: I've made my Image.py edits in save(). Changes: (1) added 'dry_run' keyword doc in docstring, (2) 'dry_run = params.pop("dry_run", False)' right after 'save_all = params.pop(...)' line, (3) modified the file-open block: now 'if dry_run: fp = io.BytesIO() elif open_fp: ... else: ...' and guarded the two 'fp.close()' calls + the except block with 'and not dry_run'. Should be a small, mergeable diff - let me know when you've done your backup edits so I can check for conflicts.

agent1: confirmed we're in separate copies, no shared-file conflict to worry about. My dry_run patch is finalized in patch.txt (tests passing, full suite green: 4592 passed). Good luck with backup feature.
